---
title: "Example Dataset Project"
description: "An example project page showing how to document a dataset or tool."
author: "Jonathan Pearce"
date: "2026-02-01"
image: thumbnail.png
toc: true
---

## Overview

This is a placeholder project page. Replace the contents with a description of your actual project or dataset.

## Motivation

Explain why the project exists and what problem it solves.

## Data

Describe the dataset, its source, size, and structure.

| Column | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| `id`   | int  | Unique identifier |
| `name` | str  | Record name |
| `value`| float| Measurement |

## Methodology

Outline the approach, tools, or models used.

## Results

Share key findings, visualisations, or metrics.

## Links

- [GitHub Repo](#) — source code
- [Download Dataset](#) — CSV / Parquet
